cisa_kev.note: CISA KEV mirror on GitHub. Public domain / CC0 according to the upstream repository.

first_epss.note: EPSS API. Used for high-percentile exploitation pressure and KEV enrichment.

threatfox.note: Optional but enabled when ABUSECH_AUTH_KEY is present. Uses recent API plus full export candidates for a 6-month historical approximation where available. The key is never written to output.

gdelt.note: FIMI-lite narrative spike watch using the GDELT DOC 2.0 API ArticleList mode. GDELT is not a disinformation classifier; it is used as a media/narrative-volume sensor.

euvsdisinfo.note: Curated pro-Kremlin disinformation case watch using EUvsDisinfo as a validated case source. v0.1.4 queries EUvsDisinfo exposure through GDELT domain-restricted ArticleList calls; direct database scraping is intentionally avoided.

disarm.note: DISARM-aligned local tag mapping for FIMI-lite. It classifies retrieved titles/snippets into transparent narrative/TTP-style categories without claiming official DISARM IDs.

urlhaus.note: Optional later addition. Free abuse.ch Auth-Key required. Disabled by default.
